title: Proton Cannon Flashpoop/Green Screen Test Video with A Download Link and a Regular Poop at the end
description:
A little animation test for this here proton cannon and a little youtube poop too. Comes with a download of the green screen footage and all necessary effects so y'all can show off your Sunday best too!
http://www.mediafire.com/download/4cbqj2jcs12w72h/proton+cannon+and+effects.zip

I'd like to thank Chaofanatic for providing UMVC3's Proton Cannon Model, and Masterofzoroark for the Egg Nega Wisp green screens, made from the in-game model and animations provided by Chaofanatic.

Oh yeah, Masterofzoroark gave me those robotnik maskings too.
